_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Manage the internal relationship with information technology (IT) process owners supporting the service, assisting with the definition and agreement of operating level agreements (OLAs).
reference_document_element_description: Manage data service level agreements with internal consumers, including SLA definition, performance measurement, breach reporting, and service improvement planning.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-003 (OP, cosine: 0.534), OP-A-002 (OP, cosine: 0.523).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.608). Shared vocabulary: [agreements, definition, internal, level, manage, service]. DCWF-only terms [agreement, assisting, information, olas, operating, owners] vs WIDAI-only terms [breach, consumers, data, improvement, measurement, performance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.877, R=0.887). Balanced P/R — the 24-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.9%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Manage the internal relationship with information technology (IT) process owners" and "Manage data service level agreements with internal consumers, including SLA defi". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.551 < STS 0.608 (gap -0.057). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [agreement, assisting, information] and [breach, consumers, data] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 25.8%. Shared tokens: [agreements, definition, internal, level, manage, service]. DCWF-only: [agreement, assisting, information, olas, operating, owners]. WIDAI-only: [breach, consumers, data, improvement, measurement, performance].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.9% on Superset of classification. The matched KSA operates in a different professional domain than the obligation/competency requires. STS 0.608 passed the threshold but secondary signals contradict the match.
